summary: Completed comprehensive testing of muscle map polygon alignment fixes. All core functionality working correctly after Y-coordinate adjustments.
passed_tests: Muscle Map page loads correctly at step 2
Male anterior view muscle polygons display when checkbox is checked
Male posterior view muscle polygons display when switching views
Clicking on muscle areas creates markers with correct muscle identification
Markers appear in the correct positions on the muscle map
Markers can be removed by clicking on them
Clear All Markers button works correctly
View toggle (Anterior/Posterior) switches the body view correctly
Gender toggle (Male/Female) switches the body image correctly
Hover functionality shows muscle tooltips correctly
Multiple markers can be created and managed
Polygon alignment appears correct after Y-coordinate fixes
